body:
🤖 **Issue Processor — Follow-up pass failed**

Cycle 1 implementation pass for PR #129 prepared a fix for the Analyzer C blocking finding (SFL Loop node shown for non-SFL repos), but `push_to_pull_request_branch` failed with:

> Cannot generate incremental patch: failed to fetch origin/agent-fix/issue-128-8a49116f59d91834. Error: `fatal: could not read Username for 'https://github.com': No such device or address`

The fix was committed locally but could not be pushed to the PR branch. The `agent:pause` label is already present on this issue. A human or subsequent run with working git credentials should retry the push.
2026-03-08 2:17 AM EST | Issue Processor | Issue #128 → PR #129 | ❌ Push to PR branch failed — git auth not available in runtime
